entities.remarks: 如果指定的设备节点表示硬件或软件总线设备，则 PnP 管理器会查询设备的驱动程序以获取子级列表，然后尝试配置和启动以前未配置的任何子设备。 PnP 管理器还会启动意外删除不再存在的设备， (看到 IRP_MN_SURPRISE_REMOVAL) 。 此函数的调用方必须具有 SeLoadDriverPrivilege。 Microsoft Windows SDK 文档中介绍了 (特权。) 有关使用绑定到本地或远程计算机的设备实例句柄的信息，请参阅 CM_Get_Child_Ex。 Windows 8 和 Windows Server 2012 及更高版本的操作系统中删除了访问远程计算机的功能，因此在这些版本的 Windows 上运行时，无法访问远程计算机。 要求

entities.name: PropertyBufferSize
entities.description: Specifies the size of the buffer for device class properties. When set to zero, RequiredSize receives the required buffer size.

return_value.description: 如果操作成功，函数将返回CR_SUCCESS。 否则，它将返回 Cfgmgr32.h 中定义的CR_前缀错误 代码之一。

entities.remarks: Caller must be a member of Administrators group. Class name property cannot be set as it's based on corresponding ClassGUID.

entities.name: CM_SETUP_DEVNODE_READY
entities.description: 重启因设备配置问题而未运行的设备实例。

entities.name: CM_SETUP_DEVNODE_RESET
entities.description: 重置未设置'未重启设备状态'标志的设备实例。如果通过调用 CM_Query_And_Remove_SubTree 或 CM_Query_And_Remove_SubTree_Ex 并指定相应标志。
entities.syntax: CMAPI CONFIGRET CM_Setup_DevNode_Ex(DEVINST dnDevInst, ULONG ulFlags, HMACHINE hMachine);

parameters.name: dnDevInst
parameters.description: 绑定到本地计算机的设备实例句柄。[in] ulFlags 保留。 必须设置为零。

return_value.description: 如果操作成功，函数将返回CR_SUCCESS。否则返回Cfgmgr32.h中定义的CR_前缀错误代码之一。

entities.remarks: 设备安装应用程序 应使用 DIF_PROPERTYCHANGE 请求重启设备，而不是使用此函数。 DIF_PROPERTYCHANGE请求可用于启用、禁用、重启、停止或更改设备的属性。 如果设备实例没有问题并且已启动， 则CM_Setup_DevNode 返回，而不会更改设备实例的状态。 调用 CM_Get_DevNode_Status 或 CM_Get_DevNode_Status_Ex 以确定设备实例的状态和问题代码。 此函数在不发送 IRP_MN_QUERY_REMOVE_DEVICE 请求或调用类安装程序或辅助安装程序的情 况下卸载设备。 如果应用程序仅在桌面的目标平台上运行，而不是调用 CM_Uninstall_DevNode，则应用程序应通过使用DIF_REMOVE代码调用

entities.name: PCALLBACK_CONTEXT
entities.description: Pointer to callback context structure

entities.name: SubmitThreadpoolWork
entities.description: Submits a work item to the thread pool

entities.name: LeaveCriticalSection
entities.description: Releases ownership of the specified critical section object.

entities.name: WorkCallback
entities.description: _Inout_ PTP_CALLBACK_INSTANCE Instance, _Inout_opt_ PVOID Context, _Inout_ PTP_WORK pWork ){

entities.name: CM_Unregister_Notification
entities.description: Unregisters a device notification callback previously registered with CM_Register_Notification.

entities.name: CloseThreadpoolWork
entities.description: Closes a threadpool work object.

entities.name: DeleteCriticalSection
entities.description: Deletes a critical section object.

entities.name: WAIT_OBJECT_0
entities.description: Return value indicating the wait condition was satisfied (signaled state)
entities.remarks: Used as a return value for wait functions indicating the specified object was signaled. Part of the standard wait return codes along with WAIT_TIMEOUT and WAIT_FAILED.

entities.name: CM_CDMASK_DEVINST
entities.description: Configuration Manager constant mask for device instance

entities.name: CM_CDMASK_DESCRIPTION
entities.description: If set, CM_Get_Resource_Conflict_Details provides a value for the CD_szDescription member. Part of the CD_ulMask flags used with CM_Get_Resource_Conflict_Details function.

entities.name: CM_CDFLAGS_ROOT_OWNED
entities.description: If set, indicates the conflicting resources are owned by the root device (HAL). When this flag is set, CD_dnDevInst will be -1.

entities.name: IO_ALIAS_10_BIT_DECODE
entities.description: 定义设备解码端口地址的10位模式。与其他解码模式（12位、16位等）相关。
entities.remarks: 定义 设备解码端口地址的 10 位。设备解码端口地址的 12 位。设备解码端口地址的 16 位。 设备使用“正解码”而不是“减反解码”。 为 IOR_Alias 指定的标志与为 IOD_DesFlags 指定的地址解码标志具有相同的解释。 (但是，这两组标志在赋值中并不等效，不能互换使用。) 可以使用任一组标志指定资源要求列表，但建议在 IOD_DesFlags 中使用解码标志。 如果使用 IOD_DesFlags 和 IOR_Alias 指定地址解码标志， 则后者的内容将替代前者。

entities.name: UpdateDriverForPlugAndPlayDevices
entities.description: Updates the driver for a Plug and Play device. If the driver update requires a system reboot, the function can indicate this requirement. Typically, device installation applications should pass NULL for bRebootRequired parameter, allowing the system to initiate reboot if needed.

return_value.description: 如果设备已升级到指定的驱动程序，则函数返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE ，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来检索记录的错误。 下表包含 GetLastError 返回的可能错误值。 返回代码

entities.name: DIURFLAG_NO_REMOVE_INF
entities.description: Specifies that DiUninstallDriver should remove the driver package from any devices it was installed on, but not remove it from the driver store. Warning: Forcibly uninstalling driver packages may result in replacing more compatible or newer drivers with less compatible or older ones.

entities.name: INSTALLFLAG_READONLY
entities.description: When this flag is set, the function will not copy, rename, or delete any installation files. Usage should be restricted to environments with limited or no file access, such as embedded operating systems.

entities.name: ERROR_NO_SUCH_DEVINST
entities.description: No such device instance exists.
entities.remarks: The specified device instance does not exist.

entities.name: INSTALLFLAG_FORCE
entities.description: 如果设置了此标志，并且函数找到与 HardwareId 值匹配的设备，则无论计算机上是否已存在更好的驱动程序，该函数都为设备安装新的驱动程序。注意：请谨慎使用此标志，可能导致较旧的驱动程序覆盖较新的驱动程序。

entities.name: InstallHinfSection
entities.description: 由Setupapi.dll导出的入口点函数，用于执行.inf文件的节。可通过调用Rundll32.exe实用工具来调用此函数。

entities.name: SetupAddInstallSectionToDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Adds file operations specified in CopyFile and DelFile lines from an INF file's Install section to a disk space list. The ANSI version is SetupAddInstallSectionToDiskSpaceListA.

entities.name: SetupAddSectionToDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Adds a section to a disk space list, which includes all file copy or delete operations listed in the 'Copy Files' or 'Delete Files' section of an INF file. The ANSI version is SetupAddSectionToDiskSpaceListA.

entities.name: SetupAddToDiskSpaceList
entities.description: 函数向磁盘空间列表添加单个删除或复制操作。若要在INF文件的节中添加所有文件操作，请使用SetupAddSectionToDiskSpaceList或SetupAddInstallSectionToDiskSpaceList。该函数有ANSI(SetupAddToDiskSpaceListA)和Unicode(SetupAddToDiskSpaceListW)两个版本。

entities.name: SetupAddToSourceList
entities.description: Adds a value to the current user's or system's installation source list. If the value already exists, it is first removed to prevent duplicate entries.

entities.name: SetupAdjustDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Adjusts the amount of space required for a specified drive in a disk space list.

entities.name: SetupBackupError
entities.description: Displays a dialog box to notify the user of a backup error during setup.

entities.name: SetupCancelTemporarySourceList
entities.description: Cancels any temporary source lists and no-browse behaviors, restoring standard source list behavior.

entities.name: SetupCloseFileQueue
entities.description: Closes and destroys a setup file queue handle created by SetupOpenFileQueue.

entities.name: SetupCloseInfFile
entities.description: Closes an INF file that was opened by a call to SetupOpenInfFile.

entities.name: SetupOpenAppendInfFile
entities.description: Appends information from an INF file to an INF file previously opened by SetupOpenInfFile. (Unicode version)

entities.name: SetupCloseLog
entities.description: 关闭由SetupAPI创建的日志文件

entities.name: SetupCommitFileQueue
entities.description: 函数对安装程序文件队列执行排队的文件操作。

entities.name: SetupCopyError
entities.description: Displays a dialog box to notify the user of a file copy error. (Unicode version: SetupCopyOEMInfW, ANSI version: SetupCopyOEMInfA)

entities.name: SetupCopyOEMInf
entities.description: Copies specified .inf file to the %windir%/Inf directory.

entities.name: SetupCreateDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Creates a disk space list for use with disk space operations.

entities.name: SetupDecompressOrCopyFile
entities.description: 函数复制文件，并在必要时解压缩该文件。

entities.name: SetupDefaultQueueCallback
entities.description: 函数是安装API中包含的默认队列回调例程。可以使用它处理设备安装过程中的文件队列操作。

entities.name: SetupDeleteError
entities.description: Displays a dialog box to inform the user about a deletion error (Unicode version)

entities.name: SetupDestroyDiskSpaceList
entities.description: 函数销毁磁盘空间列表，并释放分配给它的资源。

entities.name: SetupDuplicateDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Creates a duplicate of a disk space list as a new independent disk space list. This function has both ANSI (SetupDuplicateDiskSpaceListA) and Unicode (SetupDuplicateDiskSpaceListW) versions.

entities.name: SetupEnumInfSections
entities.description: 从 INF 文件中枚举节名称 (Unicode 版本)

entities.name: SetupFindFirstLine
entities.description: 在 INF 文件的指定节中查找第一行。如果 Key 参数为 NULL，则返回该节的第一行。此函数支持 Unicode 版本。

entities.name: SetupFindNextLine
entities.description: Returns the position of the next line relative to ContextIn.Line in an INF file section.

entities.name: SetupFindNextMatchLine
entities.description: Retrieves the next line in an INF file that matches a specified key. This is the ANSI version of the function.

entities.name: SetupFreeSourceList
entities.description: 释放分配给源列表的系统资源

entities.name: SetupGetBinaryField
entities.description: 函数从INF文件部分中的一行（从指定字段到行末尾）检索二进制数据。

entities.name: SetupGetFieldCount
entities.description: 函数检索 INF 文件中指定行中的字段数。

entities.name: SetupGetFileCompressionInfo
entities.description: Retrieves compression information for a file, including its full path, compressed size, and uncompressed size. The ANSI version is SetupGetFileCompressionInfoExA.

entities.name: SetupGetFileCompressionInfoEx
entities.description: Retrieves compression information about a file including compression type, full path, compressed size, and uncompressed size. Supports Unicode.

entities.name: SetupGetFileQueueCount
entities.description: 从安装文件队列中获取文件计数

entities.name: SetupGetFileQueueFlags
entities.description: 从安装文件队列获取标志。

entities.name: SetupGetInfFileList
entities.description: Retrieves a list of INF files located in the specified directory and returns them in the caller-provided buffer (Unicode version).

entities.name: SetUpGetInfInformation
entities.description: Retrieves SP_INF_INFORMATION structure for a specified INF file. ANSI version is SetupGetInfInformationA, Unicode version is SetupGetInfInformationW.

entities.name: SetupGetIntField
entities.description: 函数从 INF 文件中某行的指定字段中检索整数值。

entities.name: SetupGetLineByIndex
entities.description: Retrieves a line from an INF file section by its index.

entities.name: SetupGetLineCount
entities.description: Retrieves the number of lines in a specified section of an INF file.

entities.name: SetupGetLineText
entities.description: 函数以紧凑形式返回 INF 文件中行的内容。

entities.name: SetupGetMultiSzField
entities.description: Retrieves multiple strings stored in an INF file line from a specified field to the end of the line. (ANSI version)

entities.name: SetupGetSourceFileLocation
entities.description: Retrieves the location of source files listed in an INF file.

entities.name: SetupGetSourceFileSize
entities.description: Retrieves the uncompressed size of a source file listed in an INF file. The ANSI version is SetupGetSourceFileSizeA and the Unicode version is SetupGetSourceFileSizeW.

entities.name: SetupGetSourceInfo
entities.description: Retrieves the path, tag file, or media descriptor for a source listed in an INF file.

entities.name: SetupGetStringField
entities.description: 从INF文件行的指定字段中检索字符串

entities.name: SetupGetTargetPath
entities.description: Determines the target directory for a file list section.

entities.name: SetupInitDefaultQueueCallback
entities.description: Initializes resources allocated by SetupInitDefaultQueueCallback or SetupInitDefaultQueueCallbackEx.

entities.name: SetupInitDefaultQueueCallbackEx
entities.description: Initializes context for default queue callback routines used in the same way as SetupInitDefaultQueueCallback, but provides an additional window handle for the callback function to receive progress messages.

entities.name: SetupInitializeFileLog
entities.description: Initializes a file log to record installation operations and results. This can be a system log where Windows tracks files installed as part of the OS, or any other file.

entities.name: SetupInstallFile
entities.description: Installs a file specified by an INFCONTEXT returned from SetupFindXXXLine functions, or explicitly by filename and path. This is the Unicode version (SetupInstallFileW). The ANSI version is SetupInstallFileA.

entities.name: SetupInstallFileEx
entities.description: Installs a file specified by an INFCONTEXT returned from SetupFindXXXLine functions, or explicitly by filename and path information. (Unicode version)

entities.name: SetupInstallFilesFromInfSection
entities.description: Installs files specified in the CopyFiles, DeleteFiles, and RenameFiles sections of an INF file, as listed in the Install section. (Unicode)

entities.name: SetupInstallFromInfSection
entities.description: 函数执行 INF 文件 Install 节中的所有指令。 (ANSI) SetupInstallFromInfSectionW

entities.name: SetupInstallServicesFromInfSection
entities.description: Installs or removes services as specified in a Service Install section of an INF file.

entities.name: SetupInstallServicesFromInfSectionEx
entities.description: Installs or removes services as specified in the Service Install section of an INF file. This is the Unicode version of the function.

entities.name: SetupIterateCabinet
entities.description: Iterates through all files in a cabinet file and sends notifications to a callback function for each file found. (Unicode)

entities.name: SetupLogError
entities.description: Writes an error message to the setup log file.

entities.name: SetupLogFile
entities.description: Writes an entry to a log file. This function has both ANSI (SetupLogFileA) and Unicode (SetupLogFileW) versions.

entities.name: SetupOpenFileQueue
entities.description: Creates a setup file queue for file operations during installation.

entities.name: SetupOpenInfFile
entities.description: Opens an INF file and returns a handle to it. [in] Context Pointer to an INF file context that specifies the text line to be written to the text log. This context is obtained by calling SetupOpenInfFile.

entities.name: SetupOpenLog
entities.description: Opens a log file for setup operations.

entities.name: SetupOpenMasterInf
entities.description: 函数打开主 INF 文件，其中包含随 Windows 附带的文件的文件和布局信息。

entities.name: SetupPromptForDisk
entities.description: Displays a dialog box prompting the user for a disk (Unicode version)

entities.name: SetupPromptReboot
entities.description: 函数询问用户是否要重新启动系统，(可选)取决于提交文件队列中的任何文件是否在文件操作期间使用。

entities.name: SetupQueryDrivesInDiskSpaceList
entities.description: 函数用于查询磁盘空间列表中包含的驱动器列表。(Unicode版本为SetupQueryDrivesInDiskSpaceListW)

entities.name: SetupQueryFileLog
entities.description: Retrieves information from the setup file log. The Unicode version is SetupQueryFileLogW, ANSI version is SetupQueryFileLogA.

entities.name: SetupQueryInfFileInformation
entities.description: Retrieves INF file information from an SP_INF_INFORMATION structure into a buffer (Unicode version).

entities.name: SetupQueryInfOriginalFileInformation
entities.description: Retrieves the original file name of an OEM INF file. This function has both ANSI (SetupQueryInfOriginalFileInformationA) and Unicode (SetupQueryInfOriginalFileInformationW) versions.

entities.name: SetupQueryInfVersionInformation
entities.description: Retrieves INF file version information from an SP_INF_INFORMATION structure into a buffer. (Unicode)

entities.name: SetupQuerySourceList
entities.description: 函数查询安装源的当前列表。该列表基于系统和用户特定的列表生成，并可能由临时列表重写（请参阅SetupSetSourceList）。

entities.name: SetupQuerySpaceRequiredOnDrive
entities.description: Determines the space required on a specific drive to perform all file operations listed in a file queue.

entities.name: SetupQueueCopy
entities.description: Adds a single file copy operation to the setup file queue. (Unicode version: SetupQueueDefaultCopyW, ANSI version: SetupQueueDefaultCopyA)

entities.name: SetupQueueCopyIndirect
entities.description: 该函数是SetupQueueCopy的扩展形式，通过SP_FILE_COPY_PARAMS结构传递参数。功能与SetupQueueCopy相同，但支持Unicode版本(SetupQueueCopySectionA)。

entities.name: SetupQueueCopySection
entities.description: Queues files specified in an INF file section for copying during installation (Unicode version).

entities.name: SetupQueueDefaultCopy
entities.description: 函数使用INF文件中指定的默认源媒体和目标，将单个文件添加到安装程序文件队列中进行复制。

entities.name: SetupQueueDelete
entities.description: 函数在安装文件队列上放置单个文件删除操作。(ANSI版本为SetupQueueDeleteSectionA)

entities.name: SetupQueueDeleteSection
entities.description: 将INF文件节中的所有文件排队以删除。该节必须采用正确的删除文件格式，INF文件必须包含DestinationDirs部分。(Unicode)

entities.name: SetupQueueRename
entities.description: Places a single file rename operation on a setup file queue (Unicode version). This function is used during installation operations.

entities.name: SetupQueueRenameSection
entities.description: 函数在INF文件中排队用于重命名的部分。该节必须采用正确的重命名列表节格式，INF文件必须包含DestinationDirs节。(Unicode)

entities.name: SetupRemoveFileLogEntry
entities.description: Removes an entry or section from a file log. The ANSI version is SetupRemoveFileLogEntryA and Unicode version is SetupRemoveFileLogEntryW.

entities.name: SetupRemoveFromDiskSpaceList
entities.description: Removes an entry from a disk space list. The ANSI version is SetupRemoveFromDiskSpaceListA, the Unicode version is SetupRemoveFromDiskSpaceListW.

entities.name: SetupRemoveFromSourceList
entities.description: Removes a value from the current user's or system's installation source list. The system list and user list are merged at runtime. (Unicode version)

entities.name: SetupRemoveInstallSectionFromDiskSpaceList
entities.description: 函数在INF文件的Install节中搜索CopyFiles和DelFiles指令，并从磁盘空间列表中移除这些文件操作所需的空间

entities.name: DelFiles
entities.description: 行，并从磁盘空间列表中删除这些节中指定的文件操作。 (ANSI) SetupRemoveInstallSectionFromDiskSpaceListW

entities.name: SetupRemoveSectionFromDiskSpaceList
entities.description: 从磁盘空间列表中删除 INF 文件的‘复制文件’部分中列出的文件删除或复制操作。

entities.name: RenameError
entities.description: 函数生成一个对话框，告知用户文件重命名错误。 (ANSI) SetupRenameErrorW

entities.name: SetupScanFileQueue
entities.description: Scans the installation file queue and performs operations on each node in its copy list. Operations are specified by a set of flags. This function can be called either before or after committing the queue.

entities.name: SetupSetDirectoryId
entities.description: Associates a directory identifier in an INF file with a specific directory. This is the Unicode version of the function.

entities.name: SetupSetDirectoryIdEx
entities.description: Associates a directory identifier in an INF file with a specific directory. This function has both ANSI (SetupSetDirectoryIdExA) and Unicode (SetupSetDirectoryIdExW) versions.

entities.name: SetupSetFileQueueAlternatePlatform
entities.description: 函数将文件队列与运行函数的平台不同的目标平台相关联。这样做是为了启用非本机签名验证。

entities.name: SetupSetFileQueueFlags
entities.description: 函数设置安装程序文件队列上的标志。

entities.name: SetupSetPlatformPathOverride
entities.description: Sets a platform path override for the target computer when processing INF files for different computer architectures (Unicode version).

entities.name: SetupSetSourceList
entities.description: Sets the list of installation sources for the current user or system-wide (all users). The function has both ANSI (SetupSetSourceListA) and Unicode (SetupSetSourceListW) versions.

entities.name: SetupTerminateFileLog
entities.description: 函数释放与文件日志关联的资源。

entities.name: SetupUninstallNewlyCopiedInfs
entities.description: 函数卸载INF文件(.inf)、预编译的INF文件(.pnf)，以及之前在提交指定文件队列期间安装的目录文件(.cat)。

entities.name: SetupUninstallOEMInf
entities.description: Uninstalls the specified .inf file and any associated .pnf files.

entities.name: SetupVerifyInfFile
entities.description: 验证指定INF文件的数字签名，可使用相应目录进行验证。支持对备用平台执行验证。(Unicode)

entities.name: FileCallback
entities.description: 回调函数由SetupAPI函数使用，用于文件操作回调(ANSI版本)。对应PSP_FILE_CALLBACK_W宽字符版本。

entities.name: SPFILENOTIFY_NEEDNEWCABINET
entities.description: SetupAPI回调通知类型，当需要新CAB文件时触发。参数为FILE_IN_CABINET_INFO结构体。

entities.name: FILE_IN_CABINET_INFO
entities.description: 提供有关在内阁中找到的文件的信息。

entities.name: FILEPATHS_SINGNERINFO
entities.description: 结构存储源和目标路径信息，以及文件签名信息。 (Unicode) FILEPATHS_W FILEPATHS 结构存储源和目标路径信息。 安装函数在发送到回调例程的多个通知中将 FILEPATHS 结 构作为参数发送。 有关详细信息，请参阅通知。 (Unicode) INFCONTEXT INFCONTEXT 结构存储用于导航 INF 文件的上下文信息，如

entities.name: SOURCE_MEDIA
entities.description: Structure used with SPFILENOTIFY_NEEDMEDIA notification to provide source media information.

entities.name: SP_ALTPLATFORM_INFO_V2
entities.description: 结构用于将备用平台的信息传递给 SetupQueryInfOriginalFileInformation。

entities.name: SP_FILE_COPY_PARAMS
entities.description: 结构描述单个文件复制操作。 (ANSI) SP_FILE_COPY_PARAMS_W

entities.name: SP_INF_INFORMATION
entities.description: 结构存储有关 INF 文件的信息，包括样式、构成 INF 文件和版本数据的数量。

entities.name: SP_INF_SIGNER_INFO
entities.description: 结构存储有关 INF 文件的数字签名的信息。 (sp_inf_signer_info_v2_w) SP_NEWDEVICEWIZARD_DATA 安装程序使用SP_NEWDEVICEWIZARD_DATA结构通过添加自定义页面来扩展硬件安装向导的操 作。 它用于DIF_NEWDEVICEWIZARD_XXX安装请求。

entities.name: SP_ORIGINAL_FILE_INFO
entities.description: Contains original INF file name and directory information returned by SetupQueryInfOriginalFileInformation (Unicode)

entities.name: SP_REGISTER_CONTROL_STATUS
entities.description: Callback function that contains information about files registered or unregistered using the RegisterDlls INF directive for self-registering DLLs on Windows 2000.

entities.name: ClassGuildList
entities.description: Retrieves the list of class GUIDs installed on the system. If ClassGuidList is NULL, ClassGuidSize must be zero. [out] RequiredSize points to a DWORD variable that receives the number of GUIDs returned (if the number is less than or equal to the size of the array pointed to by ClassGuidList parameter). If this number is greater than the size of ClassGuidList array, it indicates how large the ClassGuidList array must be to contain all class GUIDs.

return_value.description: 如果成功，该函数将返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE ，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来 检索记录的错误。

entities.remarks: 若要检索本地计算机上安装的类数，请调用 SetupDiBuildClassInfoList，其中 ClassGuidList 设置为 NULL，ClassGuidSize 设置为零。 为了响应此类调用，函数返回 RequiredSize 中的*类数。 如果类的注册表项中存在 NoUseClass 值项，SetupDiBuildClassInfoList 不会返回类的类 GUID。 若要检索安装在远程系统上的安装程序类 GUID 的列表，请使用 SetupDiBuildClassInfoListEx。

entities.name: SPDIT_CLASSDRIVER
entities.description: 指定在生成驱动程序列表时使用的类。如果未指定DeviceInfoData，则使用与设备信息集关联的类。如果设备信息集没有关联的类，则使用所有类的驱动程序。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_ALLOWEXCLUDEDDRVS
entities.description: If set, includes drivers marked as 'Exclude from selection'. For example, when this flag is set: SetupDiSelectDevice shows drivers with 'Exclude from selection' status, and SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList includes such drivers in the requested driver list. A driver is 'Exclude from selection' if marked with ExcludeFromSelect in INF file, or if it's a device driver in class installer INF with NoInstallClass/NoUseClass tags. PnP device drivers are typically excluded from selection (PnP devices shouldn't be manually installed). Callers of SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList for PnP devices must set this flag.

entities.name: DriverPath
entities.description: 当设置为NULL时，此函数将从默认INF文件位置%SystemRoot%\inf生成驱动程序列表。生成的列表可通过SetupDiEnumDriverInfo枚举。如果驱动程序列表与设备实例关联（指定DeviceInfoData），则生成的列表由与它们关联的设备实例具有相同类的驱动程序组成。

entities.name: DI_NEEDREBOOT
entities.description: For NT-based operating systems, this flag is set if a device requires the computer to be restarted after device installation or device state change. Class installers or co-installers can set this flag at any time during device installation if they determine a reboot is needed.

entities.name: DICS_FLAG_CONFIGSPECIFIC
entities.description: Flag indicating to open a key for storing hardware profile-specific configuration information. The key is rooted in one of the hardware profile-specific branches rather than HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE. The exact key opened depends on the KeyType parameter value.

return_value.description: 如果成功，该函数将返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE ，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来 检索记录的错误。

entities.remarks: 根据 samDesired 参数中传递的值，此函数的调用方可能需要成为 Administrators 组的成员。通过调用 RegCloseKey 关闭从此函数返回的句柄。 在调用此函数之前，必须注册指定的设备实例。 但是，请注意，操作系统会自动注册 PnP 设备 实例。 有关如何注册非 PnP 设备实例的信息，请参阅 SetupDiRegisterDeviceInfo。

entities.name: SetupDiCreateDeviceInfoListEx
entities.description: Creates an empty device information set on a remote or local computer and optionally associates the set with a device setup class.

entities.name: SetupDiGetDeviceInfoListClass
entities.description: Retrieves the GUID of the device setup class associated with a device information set (if the set has an associated class).
entities.syntax:
WINSETUPAPI BOOL SetupDiGetDeviceInfoListClass(   [in]  HDEVINFO DeviceInfoSet,
[out] LPGUID   ClassGuid);

parameters.name: DeviceInfoSet
parameters.description: 设置为查询的设备信息的句柄。[out] ClassGuid 指向 GUID 类型的变量的指针，该变量接收关联类的 GUID。

return_value.description: 如果成功，该函数将返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE ，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来 检索记录的错误。

entities.remarks: 如果指定的设备信息集没有关联的类，因为使用 SetupDiCreateDeviceInfoList 创建该集时未指 定类 GUID，则函数将失败。 在这种情况下，对 GetLastError 的调用将返回 ERROR_NO_ASSOCIATED_CLASS。 如果设备信息集适用于远程计算机，请使用 SetupDiGetDeviceInfoListDetail 获取关联的远程计算机句柄和计算机名称。 要求

entities.name: InfHandle
entities.description: Handle to an INF file context used in device installation functions.

return_value.description: 如果 SetupDiCreateDevRegKey 成功，该函数将返回指定注册表项的句柄，在该注册表项中可以存储和检索特定于设备的配置数据。 如果 SetupDiCreateDevRegKey 失败，该函数将返回 INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE。 调用 GetLastError 以获取扩展的错误信息。

entities.name: DIWP_FLAG_USE_DEVINFO_DATA
entities.description: Flag indicating to use device information data

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_DIDINFOLIST
entities.description: 与DI_DIDCLASS标志相关。DI_MULTMFGS标志也会重置。如果销毁兼容的驱动程序列表，则会为相应的设备信息元素重置DI_FLAGSEX_DIDCOMPATINFO和DI_DIDCOMPAT标志。

entities.name: DeviceInterfaceData
entities.description: Identifies a requested device interface. To get detailed information about the interface, call SetupDiGetDeviceInterfaceDetail. Details include the name of the device interface that can be passed to Win32 functions such as CreateFile to obtain a handle to the interface.

entities.name: TargetOSVersion
entities.description: Specifies target OS version information used in INF files. Related to SP_ALTPLATFORM_INFO structure which provides Windows version and processor architecture information.

entities.name: SP_ALTPLATFORM_INFO
entities.description: Contains alternate platform information for driver installation. Available in Windows Vista and later versions.

entities.name: InfSectionWithExt
entities.description: Specifies the buffer size in characters. If InfSectionWithExt is NULL, this parameter must be zero. [out, optional] RequiredSize points to a variable that receives the size in characters needed to return the DDInstall section name, platform extension, and terminating NULL character. [out, optional] Extension points to a variable that receives a pointer to the '.' character marking the start of the extension in the InfSectionWithExt buffer. This parameter is not set if the InfSectionWithExt buffer is not provided or is too small. Set this parameter to NULL if a pointer to the extension is not needed.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 如果函数失败，则返回 FALSE。 要获得更多的错误信息，请调 用 GetLastError。

entities.remarks: This function supports extensions to DDInstall section names, which are used to specify OS-specific and architecture-specific installation behaviors for devices. For more information on these extensions, see Creating INF Files for Multiple Platforms and Operating Systems. SetupDiGetActualSectionToInstall searches for a DDInstall section name that matches the local computer by first searching for a decorated installation section name in the specified INF file that matches the specified name and has an extension matching the local computer's OS and processor architecture. If no such match is found, it searches for InstallSec.NT and finally returns InstallSec if no matches are found. The original DDInstall section name is written to the InfSection value entry in the driver's registry key, and the found extension is stored as an infSectionExt REG_SZ value.

entities.name: InfSection
entities.description: Represents an INF file installation section. Contains driver installation information for Windows devices.

entities.name: ProcessorArchitecture
entities.description: Defines constants representing different processor architectures

entities.name: PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE_INTEL
entities.description: PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE_IA64 PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE_AMD64 保留 设置为零。 [out, optional] InfSectionWithExt 意义 替代平台是基于 x86 的处理器体系结构。 替代平台是基于 Itanium 的处理器体系结构。替代平台是基于 x64 的处理器体系结构。 指向字符缓冲区的指针，用于接收 DDInstall 节名称、其平台扩展和 NULL 终止符。 这是应用于安装的修饰节名称。 如果此参数 NULL，则该函数将返回 TRUE TRUE，并将 RequiredSize 设置 为返回 DDInstall 节名称、其平台扩展和终止 NULL 字符所需的大小。[in] InfSectionWithExtSize

entities.name: ClassGuid
entities.description: Specifies the class GUID for a device interface class. Used with SetupDiGetClassDevs function to control which devices are returned based on interface class and other filtering options.
entities.remarks: Used with DIGCF_DEVICEINTERFACE, DIGCF_DEFAULT, and DIGCF_ALLCLASSES flags to control device enumeration behavior.

entities.name: ClassDescription
entities.description: Retrieves the description of a class installed on a local or remote computer. The function requires the class GUID and can optionally take a machine name and required size parameter.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它会返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录的错误。

entities.remarks: Call SetupDiGetClassDescriptionEx to retrieve the description of an installer class installed on a remote computer. Note: Starting with Windows 8 and Windows Server 2012, this function no longer supports accessing remote computers as this feature has been removed.

entities.name: DIGCDP_FLAG_ADVANCED
entities.description: Flag indicating advanced device installation dialog page

entities.name: DIGCDP_FLAG_REMOTE_ADVANCED
entities.description: 标识远程计算机上的高级属性表。仅在Microsoft Windows 95和Windows 98中支持。Windows 2000及更高版本不应使用此标志。
entities.remarks: 与PROPERTYSHEETHEADER结构配合使用，用于处理属性表页句柄。当函数成功时返回TRUE，失败时返回FALSE。

entities.name: DIGCF_ALLCLASSES
entities.description: Specifies that the device information set should contain all device interface classes. When this flag is set, ClassGuid must be NULL.

entities.name: DIGCF_DEFAULT
entities.description: Default flag for SetupDiGetClassDevs function. When used with ClassGuid set to NULL, it adds device information elements representing devices of the specified class to the device information set.

return_value.description: 如果操作成功，SetupDiGetClassDevs 将句柄返回到 设备信息集，其中包含与提供的参数匹配的所有已安装设备。 如果操作失败，该函数将返回INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE。 若要获取扩展的 错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。

entities.name: DIGCF_PRESENT
entities.description: 仅返回当前存在的设备。

entities.name: DIGCF_PROFILE
entities.description: 仅返回属于当前硬件配置文件一部分的设备。

entities.name: DIGCF_DEVICEINTERFACE
entities.description: SetupDiGetClassDevs函数使用的标志，表示返回支持指定设备接口类的设备

entities.name: ClassInstallParams
entities.description: Contains class installation parameters. The buffer size must be at least sizeof(SP_CLASSINSTALL_HEADER) if provided, otherwise ClassInstallParamsSize must be 0.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它会返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录 的错误。

entities.remarks: 在进行任何更改之前，将验证所有参数。 因此，FALSE 返回值指示未修改任何参数。 设置类安装参数的副作用是设置了DI_CLASSINSTALLPARAMS标志。 如果调用方想要设置参数，但禁用其使用，则必须通过调用 SetupDiSetDeviceInstallParams清除此标志。 如果清除类安装参数，则会重置DI_CLASSINSTALLPARAMS标志。７ 备注

entities.name: InstallFunction
entities.description: 填充检索的类安装参数设备安装函数代码。如果缓冲区足够大，还会接收特定于函数代码的类安装参数结构。

entities.name: ClassInstallParamsSize
entities.description: Specifies the size of the CLASSINSTALLPARAMS structure. Must be 0.

entities.name: DICLASSPROP_INTERFACE
entities.description: Interface for device class properties. Contains methods for managing device class properties.

return_value.description: 如果成功，SetupDiGetClassPropertyKeys 将返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来检索记录的错误。 下表包含此函数可能记录的一些更常见的错误代码。 返回代码

entities.name: ERROR_INVALID_REFERENCE_STRING
entities.description: The reference string is invalid.

entities.name: PropertyKey
entities.description: Represents a property key used in Windows property system

entities.name: ERROR_INSUFFICENT_BUFFER
entities.description: The data area passed to a system call is too small.

entities.name: SPCRP_SECURITY
entities.description: Specifies the security descriptor for a device in relative format (as described in Microsoft Windows SDK documentation)

entities.name: SPCRP_UPPERFILTERS
entities.description: Windows Vista及更高版本中，用于获取设备安装类的上层筛选器驱动程序服务名称列表的REG_MULTI_SZ类型常量。

entities.name: DeviceCharacteristics
entities.description: 参数，IoCreateDevice。

entities.name: SPCRP_DEVTYPE
entities.description: 调用方提供类的设备类型。应在安装设备类时设置设备类型，并且不应在安装设备类后更改设备类型。

entities.name: SPCRP_EXCLUSIVE
entities.description: 指定用户是否可以获取对此类设备的独占访问权限。如果允许独占访问，则值为1；否则为0。安装设备类时应设置此值，安装后不应更改。

entities.name: DICUSTOMDEVPROP_MERGE_MULTISZ
entities.description: 用于合并设备实例和硬件ID关联的属性值（如果两者都存在）

entities.name: DeviceInfoSetDetailData
entities.description: Contains ConfigMgr32 system handle information. RemoteMachineName contains the name of the remote system. If the device information set has a remote handle, it must be used when calling CM_Xxx_Ex functions because DevInst handles are relative to the remote handle. If the device information set is for the local computer, RemoteMachineHandle is NULL and RemoteMachineName is an empty string.

entities.name: DeviceInstanceId
entities.description: 表示设备实例ID的数据结构，用于存储设备实例的唯一标识符。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录的 错误。

entities.name: AliasDeviceInterfaceData
entities.description: 表示设备接口的别名数据。如果设备接口属于不同的接口类，但受同一设备支持且具有相同的引用字符串，则它们被视为别名。

entities.name: DeviceInterfaceDetailData
entities.description: Contains detailed information about a device interface. The buffer must be at least (offsetof(SP_DEVICE_INTERFACE_DETAIL_DATA, DevicePath) + sizeof(TCHAR)) bytes to contain the fixed portion of the structure and a single NULL-terminated MULTI_SZ string. If deviceInterfaceDetailData is NULL, this parameter must be zero.

entities.name: DevInfoSet
entities.description: Represents a device information set in Windows Setup API. Invalid when parameters are incorrect or internal data values are invalid.

entities.name: SPDRP_ADDRESS
entities.description: Device property constant representing the device's address

entities.name: SPDRP_BUSNUMBER
entities.description: 设备属性代码，用于检索设备的总线编号。

entities.name: SPDRP_BUSTYPEGUID
entities.description: 设备属性常量，用于检索设备的总线类型GUID。该常量用于SetupDiGetDeviceRegistryProperty函数中。

entities.name: CM_DEVCAP_LOCKSUPPORTED
entities.description: Device capability flag indicating lock support

entities.name: CM_DEVCAP_REMOVABLE
entities.description: Indicates the device is removable (hot-pluggable)

entities.name: CM_DEVCAP_SURPRISEREMOVALOK

entities.name: SPDRP_CHARACTERISTICS

entities.description: (Windows XP及更高版本) 常量值用于检索包含设备电源管理信息的CM_POWER_DATA结构。

entities.name: SPDRP_INSTALL_STATE
entities.description: Retrieves a DWORD value indicating the device installation state (Windows XP and later). The installation state is represented by one of the CM_INSTALL_STATE_Xxx values defined in Cfgmgr32.h, which correspond to DEVICE_INSTALL_STATE enumeration values.

entities.name: SPDRP_LEGACYBUSTYPE
entities.description: 用于检索设备的旧总线类型，返回值为Wdm.h和Ntddk.h中定义的INTERFACE_TYPE枚举值。

entities.name: SPDRP_LOCATION_INFORMATION
entities.description: 设备属性常量，用于检索包含设备硬件位置的REG_SZ字符串。

entities.name: SPDRP_LOCATION_PATHS
entities.description: Windows Server 2003及更高版本中使用的设备属性常量，用于检索表示设备树中设备位置的REG_MULTI_SZ字符串。

entities.name: SPDRP_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_OBJECT_NAME
entities.description: Retrieves a REG_SZ string that contains the name associated with the device's PDO (Physical Device Object).

entities.name: SPDRP_REMOVAL_POLICY
entities.description: Device property constant (Windows XP and later) that retrieves the current removal policy of a device as a DWORD containing one of the CM_REMOVAL_POLICY_Xxx values defined in Cfgmgr32.h.

entities.name: SPDRP_REMOVAL_POLICY_HW_DEFAULT
entities.description: (Windows XP及更高版本) 函数将设备的硬件指定默认删除策略检索为包含Cfgmgr32.h中定义的CM_REMOVAL_POLICY_Xxx值之一的DWORD

entities.name: SPDRP_SERVICE
entities.description: Device property constant that retrieves a REG_SZ string containing the device service name.

entities.name: SPDRP_COMPATIBLEIDS
entities.description: Specifies the compatible IDs for a device. For other devices, the bus driver reports hardware and compatible IDs when enumerating child devices after receiving IRP_MN_QUERY_ID.

entities.name: SPDRP_HARDWAREID
entities.description: 设备属性常量，用于检索包含设备硬件ID列表的REG_MULTI_SZ字符串。有关硬件ID的信息，请参阅设备标识字符串。

entities.name: SPDRP_LOWERFILTERS
entities.description: Retrieves a REG_MULTI_SZ string containing the names of a device's lower-filter drivers.

entities.name: DriverInfoDetailData
entities.description: Contains detailed driver information. The structure includes size information and variable-length character buffers for hardware ID lists and compatible ID lists in REG_MULTI_SZ format.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录的 错误。

entities.remarks: If both the specified driver information member and the caller-supplied buffer are valid, this function is guaranteed to populate the structure.

entities.name: HwProfileList
entities.description: Retrieves a list of hardware profile IDs. [out] HwProfileListSize specifies the number of DWORDs in the buffer. [out] RequiredSize points to a DWORD variable that receives the number of currently defined hardware profiles. If the number is greater than HwProfileListSize, the list is truncated to fit the array size. RequiredSize returns the array size needed to store the entire hardware profile list. [out, optional] CurrentlyActiveIndex points to a variable that receives the index of the currently active hardware profile in the retrieved list. This parameter is optional and can be NULL. [in, optional] MachineName points to a NULL-terminated string specifying the remote system name for which to retrieve the hardware profile ID list. This parameter is optional and can be NULL. If NULL, the list is retrieved for the local system. Note: Starting with Windows 8 and Windows Server 2012, accessing remote computers with this function is no longer supported.

return_value.description: 如果成功，函数将返回 TRUE 。 否则，它将返回 FALSE ，并且可以通过调用 GetLastError 来检索记录的错误。

entities.remarks: Call SetupDiGetHwProfileListEx to retrieve hardware profile IDs for a remote computer.

entities.name: DI_FORCECOPY
entities.description: 将此标志设置为始终复制文件，即使这些文件已存在于用户的计算机上也是如此。如果调用方提供文件队列，则忽略此标志。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它会返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录 的错误。

entities.remarks: 此函数的调用方必须是 Administrators 组的成员。此函数由类安装程序在安装新设备类的设备时调用。 若要安装接口类或设备类，请使用 SetupDiInstallClassEx。７ 备注

entities.name: DI_NOVCP
entities.description: 指示 SetupInstallFromInfSection 函数不要创建自己的队列，而是使用调用方提供的队列。如果设置了此标志，则不会仅对文件进行排队复制。

entities.name: DI_NOBROWSE
entities.description: 设置此标志以禁用浏览功能，当复制操作找不到指定文件时使用。如果调用方提供文件队列，则忽略此标志。

entities.name: ClassInstall32
entities.description: Flags controlling the installation process in Windows device installation. Can be a combination of values like DI_NOVCP which indicates SetupInstallFromInfSection should use caller-provided queue instead of creating its own.

entities.name: DIF_INSTALLINTERFACES
entities.description: Device installation function flag available in Windows 2000 and later versions.

entities.name: SM_CXSMICON
entities.description: Specifies the width of small icons, in pixels.

entities.name: DEVPROP_TYPE_STRING_LIST
entities.description: Specifies the device property data type for a string list. Used with DEVPKEY_DrvPkg_Icon device property.

entities.name: DIOD_CANCEL_REMOVE
entities.description: Device installation flag constant. If specified and the device is marked for removal, the operating system will cancel the pending removal.

entities.name: DIF_REGISTERDEVICE
entities.description: Request code for registering a device instance. Should be handled in the default manner.

entities.name: ERROR_DEVICE_INTERFACE_ACTIVE
entities.description: The device interface is currently active and cannot be removed. To remove the interface, it must first be disabled using interface-specific mechanisms (e.g., IOCTL). If the caller cannot disable the interface, they must use SetupDiChangeState.

entities.name: DIF_INSTALLDEVICE
entities.description: Device installation function request code used with SetupDiCallClassInstaller. Available in Windows Server 2003 and later versions.

entities.name: DIF_SELECTBESTCOMPATDRV
entities.description: Device installation function code used to select the best compatible driver for a device. Available in Windows 2000 and later.

entities.name: ERROR_INVALID_REG_PROPERTY
entities.description: The registry property is invalid.

entities.name: SPCRP_LOWERFILTERS
entities.description: Windows Vista及更高版本中使用的常量，表示设备安装类安装的较低筛选器驱动程序的服务名称REG_MULTI_SZ列表。有关安装类筛选器驱动程序的详细信息，请参阅安装筛选器驱动程序和INF ClassInstall32部分。

entities.name: SPDRP_REMOVAL_POLICY_OVERRIDE
entities.description: Device property code for overriding the removal policy of a device.

entities.name: SPDRP_UPPERFILTERS
entities.description: Specifies the upper filter drivers for a device (SetupDiGetDeviceRegistryProperty/SetupDiSetDeviceRegistryProperty)

entities.name: SPDRP_CAPABILITIES
entities.description: Device registry property constant indicating device capabilities

entities.name: SPDRP_DEVICEDESC
entities.description: Specifies the device description displayed to users

entities.name: SPDRP_UI_NUMBER
entities.description: 设备属性代码，用于设置或检索设备的UI编号

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回 TRUE。 否则，它会返回 FALSE，可以通过调用 getLastError来检索记录 的错误。

entities.remarks: 此函数的调用方必须是 Administrators 组的成员。 无法设置类名属性，因为它基于相应的类 GUID，并在该属性发生更改时自动更新。 当

entities.name: ReturnBuffer
entities.description: 提供的缓冲区的大小（以字符为单位）。[out, optional] RequiredSize 指向 DWORD 类型的变量的指针，该变量接收 ReturnBuffer 缓冲区的大小（以字符为单位）。 此参数是可选的，可以设置为 NULL。

return_value.description: 如果 SetupGetInfDriverStoreLocation 成功，则函数返回 TRUE;否则，函数返回 FALSE。 若要获取扩展的错误信息，请调用 GetLastError。 如果请求的 INF 文件的完全限定文件名（包括 null 终止符）的大小大于 ReturnBufferSize，则该 函数将失败，并且对 GetLastError 的调用将返回ERROR_INSUFFICIENT_BUFFER。

entities.remarks: 若要确定包含驱动程序存储中指定 INF 文件的完全限定文件名所需的返回缓冲区的大小，请调用 SetupGetInfDriverStoreLocation 并将 ReturnBuffer 设置为 NULL， 将 ReturnBufferSize 设置为零，并提供 RequiredSize。 SetupGetInfDriverStoreLocation 将在 RequiredSize 中返回所需的缓冲区大小。 当设备安装在驱动程序存储中预安装 驱动程序包 时，它会创建驱动程序包 INF 文件的两个副本。 设备安装在系统 INF 目录中安装一个副本，并为该 INF 文件的副本分配一个唯一的 已发布文件名 ，格式为 OEMnnn.inf。 设备安装会在驱动程序存储中安装 INF 文件的第二个副本，并分配该副本的原始 INF 文件名。

entities.name: DriverStoreLocation
entities.description: 指定INF文件在驱动程序存储中的位置。DriverStoreLocation必须指定驱动程序存储中INF文件的完全限定文件名，或系统INF目录中INF文件的文件名和目录路径（可选）。例如：对于INF文件myinf.inf，如果设备安装在系统INF目录C:\Windows\inf中安装OEM1.inf，同时在驱动程序存储C:\windows\system32\driverstore\filerepository\myinf_12345678\myinf.inf中安装副本，则DriverStoreLocation可接受以下任一格式：C:\windows\system32\driverstore\filerepository\myinf_12345678\myinf.inf、OEM1.inf或C:\Windows\inf\OEM1.inf。

entities.name: LOGTOKEN_SETUPAPI_APPLOG
entities.description: LOGTOKEN_SETUPAPI_APPLOG is a predefined log token constant used with SetupAPI functions. When used, log entries will be written to the application installation text log but not included in text log sections. Note: Setting LogToken to this value doesn't change the thread's current log token. SetupWriteTextLog won't write log entries if: the text log's event level is lower than specified, or the event category isn't enabled for the text log.

entities.name: SetupFindXxxLine
entities.description: 函数获取行的 INF 文件上下文。 有关 INF 文件和 INF 文件上下文的信息，请参阅平台 SDK 中提供的有关使用 INF 文件、获取 INF 文件上下文和 INFCONTEXT 结构的信息。

return_value.description: 如果成功找到行，则返回 TRUE；否则返回 FALSE

entities.name: SP_CLASSIMAGE_DATA
entities.description: Contains information about a class image list. Fields include size in bytes, handle to the ImageList class image list, and reserved fields for internal use.

entities.name: DI_FUNCTION
entities.description: InstallFunction; } SP_CLASSINSTALL_HEADER, *PSP_CLASSINSTALL_HEADER; 成员 cbSize

entities.name: ClassInstallHeader
entities.description: 一个安装请求标头结构体，包含标头的大小和请求的DIF代码。用于设备安装类操作。

entities.name: ProgressNotifyParam
entities.description: 标识设备检测操作进度的不透明句柄结构。此值由发送DIF_DETECT请求的设备安装组件提供。

entities.name: DetectComplete
entities.description: 介于0和100之间的值，指示完成百分比。类安装程序在其检测活动的各个阶段递增此值，以通知用户其进度。

entities.name: SPINT_REMOVED
entities.description: 该常量已被删除并保留。请勿使用。
entities.remarks: 采用 SP_DEVICE_INTERFACE_DATA 结构的实例作为参数的 SetupAPI 函数验证提供的结构的 cbSize 成员是否等于结构的大小（以字节为单位）。 如果未正确设置 cbSize 成员， 则函数将失败，并将错误代码设置为 ERROR_INVALID_USER_BUFFER。

entities.name: DevInst
entities.description: 设备实例句柄类型，用于表示设备安装实例。Reserved 字段保留供内部使用。

entities.name: PSP_FILE_CALLBACK
entities.description: Callback function type used in setup operations

entities.name: DI_COMPAT_FROM_CLASS
entities.description: 强制 SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList 从其类驱动程序列表而非 INF 文件生成设备的兼容驱动程序列表的标识符。

entities.name: DI_DRIVERPAGE_ADDED
entities.description: 设备安装标志，表示安装程序提供了替换系统提供的驱动程序属性页的页面。如果设置此标志，操作系统不会显示系统提供的驱动程序页。

entities.name: DI_INF_IS_SORTED
entities.description: Flag indicating the 'Select Device' page should list drivers in the order they appear in the INF file rather than alphabetically.

entities.name: DI_NOFILECOPY
entities.description: Specifies whether device installation applications and components (such as SetupDiInstallDevice) should skip file copying. Used in SP_DEVINSTALL_PARAMS structure with caller-supplied file copy queue.

entities.name: DI_NOWRITE_IDS
entities.description: Prevents SetupDiInstallDevice from writing INF-specified hardware IDs and compatible IDs to the device node's device properties (devnode). Should only be set for root-enumerated devices. This flag overrides the DI_FLAGSEX_ALWAYSWRITEIDS flag.

entities.name: DI_PROPERTIES_CHANGE
entities.description: 设备安装属性更改标志。用于控制设备管理器在更改设备属性时的行为，包括UI显示、静默安装、资源页替换等功能。

entities.name: DI_SHOWCOMPAT
entities.description: Flags indicating compatibility settings for device installation

entities.name: DI_PROPS_NOCHANGEUSAGE
entities.description: FlagsEx value that controls installation and UI operations. When set, prevents the device installation process from changing the device usage.

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_ALWAYSWRITEIDS
entities.description: 如果已设置且DI_NOWRITE_IDS标志明确，请始终将硬件和兼容 ID 写入开发节点的设备属性。 应仅为根枚举设备设置此标志。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_APPENDDRIVERLIST
entities.description: 如果已设置，SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList 将新的驱动程序列表追加到现有列表中。 搜索多个位置时，此标志是相关的。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_DRIVERLIST_FROM_URL
entities.description: 如果已设置，则从INF生成驱动程序列表（从SP_DEVINSTALL_PARAMS中指定的URL检索到的DriverPath）。如果DriverPath是空字符串，请使用Windows更新网站。目前操作系统不支持URL。使用此标志指示SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList搜索Windows更新网站。如果设置了DI_QUIETINSTALL，请不要设置此标志。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_FILTERCLASSES
entities.description: 如果设置，SetupDiBuildClassInfoList将为类包含筛选器检查。这意味着如果设备类被标记为NoInstallClass，则不会包含在类列表中。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_INET_DRIVER
entities.description: 如果设置，则驱动程序是从Internet获取的。Windows不会使用设备的INF来安装将来的设备，因为无法保证可以再次从Internet检索驱动程序文件。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_NO_DRVREG_MODIFY
entities.description: Prevents processing of AddReg and DelReg entries in the device's hardware and software (driver) keys. Specifically affects INF file DDInstall and DDInstall.HW sections.

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_SETFAILEDINSTALL
entities.description: 如果设置了此标志，SetupDiInstallDevice函数只会在设备的ConfigFlags注册表值中设置FAILEDINSTALL标志（表示安装失败）。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_USECLASSFORCOMPAT
entities.description: Specifies that INF files on the device's installer class should be used when generating compatible driver lists. Setting this flag can reduce the time required to generate compatible driver lists when searching for non-precompiled INF files if the device setup class is known. This flag is ignored if DI_COMPAT_FROM_CLASS is set.

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_IN_SYSTEM_SETUP
entities.description: 如果设置，则会在初始系统设置期间进行安装。此标志为只读。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_BACKUPONREPLACE
entities.description: Flag indicating whether to backup a file before replacing it during driver installation

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_OLDINF_IN_CLASSLIST
entities.description: Flag indicating old INF files should be included in class list search

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_NOUIONQUERYREMOVE
entities.description: Flag indicating that no user interface should be shown during device removal queries.

entities.name: InstallMsgHandler
entities.description: 安装消息处理回调函数，用于处理设备安装过程中的消息通知

entities.name: ClassInstallReserved
entities.description: Reserved field in class installation data structure. Co-installers must not use this field. For internal use only.

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_FINISHINSTALL_ACTION
entities.description: Windows Vista及更高版本使用。将设备标记为具有执行Finish-Install操作。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_PROPCHANGE_PENDING
entities.description: 设备安装标志。如果设置了此标志，Device Manager将清除该标志，设置DI_PROPERTIES_CHANGE标志，并向安装程序发送通知。

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_RECURSIVESEARCH
entities.description: (Windows Vista及更高版本)如果设置此标志，SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList将执行递归搜索

entities.name: DI_FLAGSEX_SEARCH_PUBLISHED_INFS
entities.description: Windows Vista及更高版本支持。当SetupDiBuildDriverInfoList用于搜索没有指定INF路径或搜索路径的INF时，此标志将搜索限制为仅导入到驱动程序存储中的INF。

entities.name: SP_DRVINFO_DATA_V1
entities.description: Driver information structure (version 1) that does not contain driverDate and DriverVersion members.
entities.remarks: 在 SetupAPI.h中，此结构等同于SP_DRVINFO_DATA_V1或SP_DRVINFO_DATA_V2，具体取决于是否在源代码中包含以下行： #define USE_SP_DRVINFO_DATA_V1 1 仅当组件必须在 Windows 98 或 Millennium Edition 或 Windows NT 上运行时才定义此标识符。 如果组件仅在 Windows 2000 及更高版本的 Windows 中运行，请不要定义标识符。 如果未定义标识符，则使用SP_DRVINFO_DATA_V2。

entities.name: HardwareID
entities.description: Represents a hardware ID string in device identification. The first string in the buffer is the hardware ID. If this value is less than or equal to 1, no hardware ID exists.

entities.name: CompatIDsLength
entities.description: 从 HardwareID 缓冲区开头偏移量 CompatIDsOffset 开始的 CompatIDs 列表的长度（以字符为单位）。如果 CompatIDsLength 为非零，CompatIDs 列表将包含一个或多个以 NULL 结尾的字符串，该字符串在列表末尾具有额外的 NULL 字符。如果 CompatIDsLength 为零，则 CompatIDs 列表为空。在这种情况下，列表中末尾没有其他 NULL 字符。

entities.name: CompatIDs
entities.description: 列表从此缓冲区的开头CompatIDsOffset偏移量开始，并在列表末尾以额外的NULL字符结尾终止。
entities.remarks: INF模型部分按以下顺序指定设备硬件ID和兼容的ID：第一个ID（如果指定）是设备的硬件ID。其余ID（如果指定）是设备的兼容ID。分析HardwareID缓冲区时，必须确保正确确定缓冲区中数据的末尾。请注意，缓冲区不一定是双NULL终止的。例如，根据硬件ID列表和兼容的ID列表在INF模型部分中指定的方式，HardwareID缓冲区可以类似于以下任何一种：\0 <HWID>\0 <HWID>\0<COMPATID_1>\0...<COMPATID_N>\0\0\0<COMPATID_1>\0...<COMPATID_N>\0\0用于正确分析此缓冲区的算法必须使用CompatIDsOffset和CompatIDsLength字段来提取硬件ID和兼容的ID。

entities.name: DNF_ALWAYSEXCLUDEFROMLIST
entities.description: 如果设置了此标志，则无论执行枚举的客户端如何，都会阻止枚举驱动程序节点。(Windows Vista及更高版本)

entities.name: DNF_AUTHENTICODE_SIGNED
entities.description: 此标志表示驱动程序的INF文件由Authenticode签名进行签名(Windows Server 2003及更高版本)。此标志对安装程序是只读的。如果设置了DNF_BAD_DRIVER标志，SetupDiSelectBestCompatDrv和SetupDiSelectDevice将忽略此驱动程序。

entities.name: DNF_BASIC_DRIVER
entities.description: 标识驱动程序是基本驱动程序(Windows XP及更高版本)。此标志对安装程序是只读的。

entities.name: DNF_DUPDRIVERVER
entities.description: 表示其他提供驱动程序的提供程序具有与此驱动程序相同的版本。此标志对安装程序是只读的。(Windows XP及更高版本)

entities.name: DNF_DUPPROVIDER
entities.description: 标识其他提供驱动程序的提供程序具有与此驱动程序相同的说明。此驱动程序与其匹配项之间的唯一区别是驱动程序日期。此标志对安装程序是只读的。如果设置了此标志，Windows会在驱动程序旁边显示驱动程序日期和驱动程序版本以便用户可以将其与匹配项区分开来。

entities.name: DNF_INBOX_DRIVER
entities.description: Windows Vista及更高版本中使用的驱动程序标志，表示驱动程序来自系统自带的INF文件。与之相对的DNF_INET_DRIVER表示驱动程序来自Internet或Windows更新。此标志对安装程序是只读的。

entities.name: DNF_INF_IS_SIGNED
entities.description: 此标志对安装程序是只读的，如果满足以下任一条件则设置：驱动程序具有WHQL发布签名；是收件箱驱动程序；或具有Authenticode签名。有关详细信息请参阅驱动程序签名。

entities.name: DNF_INSTALLEDDRIVER
entities.description: 标志常量，表示当前为设备安装了此驱动程序节点(Windows Vista及更高版本)。此标志对安装程序是只读的。

entities.name: DNF_NODRIVER
entities.description: Flag indicating no physical driver is installed for this logical driver

entities.name: DNF_OEM_F6_INF
entities.description: Reserved constant for OEM F6 INF handling (Windows XP and later)

entities.name: DNF_OLD_INET_DRIVER
entities.description: Indicates a driver from Internet that Windows currently cannot access its source files. This flag is read-only to the installer. Windows will not install drivers marked with this flag as it lacks source files and will eventually prompt user for invalid path. The INF of such drivers can be used for everything except installing devices.

entities.name: DNF_REQUESTADDITIONALSOFTWARE
entities.description: 标志，以指示 驱动程序包 需要计算机中可能安装或未安装的其他软件。 安装设备的 驱动程序包 后，如果安装程序设置了DNF_REQUESTADDITIONALSOFTWARE 标志，即插即用 (PnP) 管理器将执行以下步骤： 1. PnP 管理器使用 RequestAddtionalSoftware 类型生成问题报告和解决方案 (PRS) 错 误报告。 此报告包含有关设备的特定硬件 ID 和计算机的系统体系结构的信息。 2. 如果有由独立硬件供应商 (IHV) 为特定于设备的软件提供的解决方案，则会将解决方案下载到计算机。 注意 解决方案的下载不会安装软件本身。 3. 如果计算机上未安装特定于设备的软件，则 PnP 管理器会向用户提供解决方案并提供用于下载软件的链接。 然后，用户可以按照解决方案中提供的说明选择下载并安装此软件。 注意如果驱动程序包的 INF 文件已在 INF ControlFlags 节中设置了 RequestAdditionalSoftware 标志，则安装程序不必设置 标志。
entities.remarks: 从 Windows 7 开始，安装程序或共同安装程序可以设置

entities.name: DIF_NEWDEVICEWIZARD_FINISHINSTALL
entities.description: Device installation function code for finishing new device wizard installation

entities.name: DIF_POWERMESSAGEWAKE
entities.description: Device installation function constant used to indicate power message wake handling (setupapi.h)

entities.name: DICS_ENABLE
entities.description: 设备启用标志。当指定DICS_FLAG_GLOBAL标志时Windows将启用设备；当指定DICS_FLAG_CONFIGSPECIFIC标志并匹配当前硬件配置文件时也会启用设备。

entities.name: DICS_PROPCHANGE
entities.description: 表示设备的属性已更改。对于此状态更改，Windows会忽略范围信息（只要它是一个有效值），并停止并重启设备。

entities.name: DICS_START
entities.description: Starts a device if the request is for the current hardware profile. Must be used with DICS_FLAG_CONFIGSPECIFIC. Cannot be performed globally. Windows will only start the device if the current hardware profile is specified, otherwise it will only set the registry flag without changing device state.

entities.name: DICS_FLAG_CONFIGGENERAL
entities.description: Specifies hardware profile ID for profile-specific changes. Zero indicates the current hardware profile.

entities.name: SPPSR_SELECT_DEVICE_RESOURCES
entities.description: 指定SetupAPI DLL提供的资源选择页面的常量值

entities.name: SPPSR_ENUM_BASIC_DEVICE_PROPERTIES
entities.description: Specifies the page provided by the BasicProperties32 provider for a device. This page is displayed in response to a DIF_ADDPROPERTYPAGE_BASIC installation request from the installer or other components.

entities.name: SPPSR_ENUM_ADV_DEVICE_PROPERTIES
entities.description: Specifies pages provided by class and/or device EnumPropPages32 providers in response to DIF_ADDPROPERTYPAGE_ADVANCED installation requests.
entities.remarks: Components retrieving property pages call SetupAPI's ExtensionPropSheetPageProc function with SP_PROPSHEETPAGE_REQUEST structure pointer, AddPropSheetPageProc address, and private data. Property sheet providers call AddPropSheetPageProc routine for each provided property sheet.

entities.name: FreeLibrary
entities.description: Decrements the reference count of the loaded dynamic-link library (DLL). When the reference count reaches zero, the module is unmapped from the address space of the calling process.

entities.name: AddPropSheetPageProc
entities.description: Callback function used to add property sheet pages.

entities.name: HwProfile
entities.description: 表示硬件配置文件的ID，用于特定于配置文件的更改。值为0表示当前硬件配置文件。

entities.name: DI_UNREMOVEDEVICE_CONFIGSPECIFIC
entities.description: Specifies the hardware profile ID for configuration-specific changes. Zero indicates the current hardware profile.
